abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens Grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its Grass-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage.

Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon.

This ability functions identically to Battle Armor.
